title: Enquiries on Hot Air Balloon Trip

groups.title: Enquiries on Hot Air Balloon Trip
groups.desc:
Questions 1-10
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.collect: Enquiries on Hot Air Balloon Trip The lowest price: 1 £$1$ per person Each participant will be given a free $2$ at the end of the flight The exact date can only be booked $3$ The balloon can fly a maximum height of $4$ metres There are no flights at $5$ The best time of year to go is in $6$ Flights may be cancelled because of bad weather, e.g., $7$ It is advised to wear a jacket and a $8$ There is no $9$ restriction for adults Participants must be able to $10$ throughout the flight

questions.title: Each participant will be given a free 【   】 at the end of the flight
The exact date can only be booked 【   】
The balloon can fly a maximum height of 【   】 metres
The best time of year to go is in 【   】
Flights may be cancelled because of bad weather, e.g., 【   】
It is advised to wear a jacket and a 【   】
There is no 【   】 restriction for adults
Participants must be able to 【   】 throughout the flight

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: Good morning, Smart Travel, Jason speaking.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Hi, good morning.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I saw your advert in today's paper about hot air balloon trips.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: It sounds pretty exciting, and I wonder how much it costs.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: Well, the price may vary depending on the location, number of participants and add-ons.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: A single ride may cost you up to 280 pounds per person.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: But if you choose group booking, there is a discount.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: And the cheapest flight is 125 pounds each for a group booking of at least ten people.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Oh, that's not too bad.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: What do you mean by add-ons?

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: They are optional items like taking photos for you during the ride, champagne and sit-down breakfast after the flight.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: Upon completing the trip, we will provide each participant with a certificate.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: And that is entirely free of charge.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Can I book a ride over the phone?

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: Yes, that's an option.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: Reservations can be made one year ahead of your trip by telephone.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: But to pick a specific date, you must book online.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: A confirmation email will be sent to you right afterwards.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: How high can the balloons go?

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: A hot air balloon's height is limited by the temperature of the air and how much fuel it can carry.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: And the highest altitude ever recorded for a ride is 1800 metres.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: But most rides stay below 300 metres.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Oh boy.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: That's impressive.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: How long is a single ride?

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: The average hot air balloon ride lasts about an hour.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: The entire ballooning experience, which includes ground preparation, flight and post-flight packing up and celebration, may take two to three hours.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: And what time are the flights?

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: Our flights generally meet about an hour before sunrise on the day.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: You will be notified of the exact meeting time the evening before your flight.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: Night flights are avoided due to weather conditions.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Fair enough.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Which month do you recommend for a hot air balloon trip?

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: Autumn is the best time of year to take the trip.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: Not only can you see the changing hues of the trees from above, but it is a great way to spend time with the whole family before it gets too cold.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I see.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: But please note that our flight may be cancelled, and you will be notified by phone the day before.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Why is that?

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: It can be quite dangerous to fly under bad weather conditions like a thunderstorm.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: So our experienced pilots will not go under such conditions.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: What should I wear for the ride?

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: We suggest wearing comfortable clothing like a jacket.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: Multiple layers are always better.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: Wearing a helmet for safety concerns is also a good idea.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: Sandals are not permitted.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Can children or older people participate?

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: All children must be above the minimum age of 9 years old.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: And they have to be accompanied by at least a parent or guardian.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: However, an adult has no age limit as long as they meet the health requirements.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: What exactly are the health requirements?

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: Participants must at least be in fair physical condition.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: For example, they shall have no significant knee, hip or back problems and no recent surgeries or broken bones.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: They must also stand unassisted for an hour during the flight.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: It is the required position during the whole flight.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: As the balloon comes to land, all passengers will need to adopt the landing position with knees bent in front of them.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Are those rides safe?

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: Hot air balloon companies are required to have a Commercial Balloon Pilot licence, and all our pilots go through rigorous training before they are allowed to fly.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: It is a relatively gentle activity.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: However, the impact of a balloon landing can vary drastically depending on factors like wind speed.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: Sometimes it is similar to the momentum of jumping off a small chair.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: If you cannot jump off a small chair, speaking to your doctor before booking a balloon flight is best.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Thank you very much.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I think that's all I need to know.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: Thanks for calling.

transcript.speaker: Jason
transcript.en: Goodbye.

1.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 £，提示词为 lowest price，此处应填数字（金额）。
题目解析：本题要注意听价格，先听到 280 搭配 up to，意为“最高价格是 280”，可判断 280 不符合题干要求，可以排除。随后听到 lowest price 在原文被替换为 cheapest flight，可判断与之搭配的数字 125 为正确答案。

2.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 each participant, the end of the flight；提示词为 a free，此处应填单数可数名词，表示行程结束后获得的免费物品。
题目解析：本题开始之前出现了一系列的项目名称，但这些项目都是收费的，不符合题干要求，可以排除。随后听到定位词 the end of the flight 在原文被替换为 upon completing the trip, each participant 原词重现，可判断与之搭配的 certificate 一词符合题干要求。此外，最后听到的 free of charge（免费），也能帮助进一步确认答案。

3.analysis:
听前预测：定位词、提示词为 exact date, be booked，此处应填方式信息。
题目解析：定位词 exact date 被替换为 specific date, be booked 以 book 的形式出现，可判断与之搭配的 online 一词符合题干要求，为正确答案。

4.analysis:
听前预测：定位词、提示词为 metres、maximum height，此处应填热气球的最高飞行高度。
题目解析：本题可以通过女士提问“How high can the balloons go?”进行定位。随后听到定位词 maximum height 在原文被替换为 highest altitude，可判断与之搭配的数字 1800 为正确答案。注意，之后出现的 300 米为干扰信息，原文说的是大部分热气球的飞行高度不超过 300 米。

5.analysis:
听前预测：提示词为 no、at，此处应填能与介词 at 搭配且被否定的名词信息。
题目解析：本题无明显定位信息，注意通过男女之间的对话来判断内容的推进。先听到女士问飞行的时间，接着听到能与介词 at 搭配使用的 night，先填写下来，之后听到 avoided 一词，对应题干否定词 no，可进一步确认答案。

6.analysis:
听前预测：定位词、提示词为 the best time of year，此处应填乘坐热气球的最佳时间。
题目解析：先听到女士问哪个月最适合热气球之旅，随后听到男士回答 autumn 最合适，可判断 autumn 为正确答案。

7.analysis:
听前预测：定位词、提示词为 bad weather，此处应填名词，表示糟糕的天气。
题目解析：定位词和提示词原词重现，随后听到 thunderstorm 一词，符合题干要求，为正确答案。

8.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 jacket；提示词为 advised to wear，此处应填单数名词（以辅音字母开头），表示某种可穿戴的物品。
题目解析：定位词 jacket 原词重现，随后听到对 jacket 的描述：最好是多层的（夹克）。继续往下听，听到 helmet 一词，符合题干要求，填写下来即可。注意之后出现的 sandals，虽为穿着类词汇，但其不能和不定冠词 a 搭配使用，并且原文说的是不允许穿 sandals，可判断其为干扰信息。

9.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 adults；提示词为 no、restriction，此处应填名词或形容词，表示对成人乘坐热气球不做限制的类型。
题目解析：先听到女士问小孩或老人是否能够参加，随后听到有关儿童的信息，不符合题干要求。继续往下听，听到转折词 however 后强调对成人没有年龄限制，可判断 age 符合题干要求，为正确答案。

10.analysis:
听前预测：提示词为 throughout the flight、to，此处应填动词（原形），且为不及物动词。
题目解析：本题须注意听动词原形。先听到一系列对身体状况的描述，且没有适配的动词原形出现。随后听到 stand 一词，符合题干要求，先填写下来，接着听到 during the flight，对应题干的 throughout the flight，可以进一步确认答案。
